payload.answer: The new fact conflicts with the existing current fact. Existing memory says Sam currently works at Goldman, while the new statement says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. Safe actions available: approve_supersession to treat the new employment transition as replacing the current Goldman employment fact; keep_both if both should be retained despite ambiguity; reject_new if the new statement should not be saved; edit if the new statement needs correction or clarification before saving.

entity_resolution.reason: Both facts refer to Sam and Goldman; the new fact additionally mentions Point72.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72

details: Explained only the backend-supplied safe actions.
Did not present the superseding claim as current without approval.
Preserved the ambiguity between the existing current employment fact and the new employment transition claim.
